name: Creamed Spinach
recipeIngredient: Various herbs or additional vegetables as desired
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the frozen spinach, creamed cheese, parmesan cheese, and finely chopped onion until well combined.
2. Pour the mixture into a baking dish.
3. Garnish with sliced boiled eggs to cover the top.
4. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until heated through.
